        <script type="text/javascript">
            $(document).ready(function() {
                $("#header .apps-menu").click(() => {
                    event.stopPropagation();
                    console.log("Menu icon clicked");
                    $("#header .apps-menu__dropdown").toggleClass("show-dropdown");
                    $(".clear-div").toggleClass("display-block");
                });

                // Clear div action
                $(".clear-div").click(() => {
                    event.stopPropagation();
                    console.log("Clear div clicked");
                    $(".apps-menu__dropdown").removeClass("show-dropdown");
                    $(".clear-div").removeClass("display-block");
                });

                // Prevent dropdown click from propagating to document
                $("#header .apps-menu__dropdown").click(function(event) {
                    event.stopPropagation();
                });
                
                // Document click to close dropdown
                $(document).click(function() {
                    if ($("#header .apps-menu__dropdown").hasClass("show-dropdown")) {
                        console.log("Document clicked outside the menu");
                        $(".apps-menu__dropdown").removeClass("show-dropdown");
                        $(".clear-div").removeClass("display-block");
                    }
                });
                
            });
        </script>
        <script async type="text/javascript">
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
                const words = ["Buy", "Sell", "Blog", "Freelance"];
                let currentWordIndex = 0;
                let currentCharIndex = 0;
                let isDeleting = false;
                const typingSpeed = 150;
                const deletingSpeed = 100;
                const delayBetweenWords = 1000;
                const dynamicTextElement = document.querySelector(".dynamic-text");

                function type() {
                    const currentWord = words[currentWordIndex];
                    if (isDeleting) {
                        currentCharIndex--;
                        dynamicTextElement.textContent = currentWord.substring(0, currentCharIndex);
                        if (currentCharIndex == 0) {
                            isDeleting = false;
                            currentWordIndex = (currentWordIndex + 1) % words.length;
                            setTimeout(type, 500); // Short delay before starting to type the next word
                        } else {
                            setTimeout(type, deletingSpeed);
                        }
                    } else {
                        currentCharIndex++;
                        dynamicTextElement.textContent = currentWord.substring(0, currentCharIndex);
                        if (currentCharIndex == currentWord.length) {
                            isDeleting = true;
                            setTimeout(type, delayBetweenWords); // Delay before starting to delete the word
                        } else {
                            setTimeout(type, typingSpeed);
                        }
                    }
                }

                type();
            });
        </script>

            <script>
                // Modal data
                const modalData = {
                    mainOptions: [
                        {
                            id: 'buy',
                            title: 'To Buy',
                            description: 'Browse products and connect with vendors',
                            icon: 'fas fa-shopping-cart',

                                { name: 'Clothing', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/market/queries/category.php?category=fashion' },
                                { name: 'Accessories', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/market/queries/category.php?category=accessories' },
                                { name: 'Food', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/market/queries/category.php?category=food' },
                                { name: 'Computers', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/market/queries/category.php?category=computer' }
                            ]
                        },
                        {
                            id: 'sell',
                            title: 'To Sell',
                            description: 'Advertise your products for free to potential buyers',
                            icon: 'fas fa-money-bill-wave',
                            url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/market/users/profile.php'
                        },
                        {
                            id: 'freelance',
                            title: 'To Freelance',
                            description: 'Become a freelancer and be visible to clients',
                            icon: 'fas fa-laptop-code',
                            url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' // Direct link to become a freelancer
                        },
                        {
                            id: 'findFreelancers',
                            title: 'Find Freelancers',
                            description: 'Get the best person for your job',
                            icon: 'fas fa-briefcase',
                            subcategories: [
                                { name: 'Web Development', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' },
                                { name: 'Graphics Design', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' },
                                { name: 'App Development', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' },
                                { name: 'Copywriter', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' },
                                { name: 'Proof Reader', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' },
                                { name: 'Video Editor', url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/freelance/' }
                            ]
                        },
                        {
                            id: 'blog',
                            title: 'To Blog',
                            description: 'Become a blogger and earn revenue',
                            icon: 'fas fa-pencil-alt',
                            url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/blog/users/profile.php'
                        },
                        {
                            id: 'readBlog',
                            title: 'Read Blog Posts',
                            description: 'Browse various blog articles',
                            icon: 'fas fa-book',
                            url: 'https://kampuskago.ng/v2/blog/'
                        }
                    ]
                };
                
                // DOM Elements
                const welcomeModal = document.getElementById('welcomeModal');
                const buyModal = document.getElementById('buyModal');
                const findFreelancersModal = document.getElementById('findFreelancersModal');
                const closeModal = document.getElementById('closeModal');
                const closeBuyModal = document.getElementById('closeBuyModal');
                const closeFindFreelancersModal = document.getElementById('closeFindFreelancersModal');
                const backBtn = document.getElementById('backBtn');
                const backFromBuy = document.getElementById('backFromBuy');
                const backFromFindFreelancers = document.getElementById('backFromFindFreelancers');
                const mainOptions = document.getElementById('mainOptions');
                const buyCategories = document.getElementById('buyCategories');
                const findFreelancersCategories = document.getElementById('findFreelancersCategories');
                
                // Initialize the modal
                function initModal() {
                    // Populate main options
                    modalData.mainOptions.forEach(option => {
                        const optionCard = document.createElement('div');
                        optionCard.className = 'option-card';
                        optionCard.innerHTML = `
                            <div class="option-icon"><i class="${option.icon}"></i></div>
                            <div class="option-title">${option.title}</div>
                            <div class="option-description">${option.description}</div>
                        `;
                        
                        optionCard.addEventListener('click', () => {
                            if (option.id === 'buy') {
                                showBuyModal();
                            } else if (option.id === 'findFreelancers') {
                                showFindFreelancersModal();
                            } else if (option.url) {
                                // Redirect to the specified URL
                                window.location.href = option.url;
                            }
                        });
                        
                        mainOptions.appendChild(optionCard);
                    });
                
                    // Populate buy categories
                    const buyOption = modalData.mainOptions.find(opt => opt.id === 'buy');
                    if (buyOption && buyOption.subcategories) {
                        buyOption.subcategories.forEach(category => {
                            const categoryCard = document.createElement('div');
                            categoryCard.className = 'subcategory-card';
                            categoryCard.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="subcategory-title">${category.name}</div>
                            `;
                            
                            categoryCard.addEventListener('click', () => {
                                // Redirect to the category page
                                window.location.href = category.url;
                            });
                            
                            buyCategories.appendChild(categoryCard);
                        });
                    }
                
                    // Populate find freelancers categories
                    const findFreelancersOption = modalData.mainOptions.find(opt => opt.id === 'findFreelancers');
                    if (findFreelancersOption && findFreelancersOption.subcategories) {
                        findFreelancersOption.subcategories.forEach(category => {
                            const categoryCard = document.createElement('div');
                            categoryCard.className = 'subcategory-card';
                            categoryCard.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="subcategory-title">${category.name}</div>
                            `;
                            
                            categoryCard.addEventListener('click', () => {
                                // Redirect to the category page
                                window.location.href = category.url;
                            });
                            
                            findFreelancersCategories.appendChild(categoryCard);
                        });
                    }
                
                    // Event listeners
                    closeModal.addEventListener('click', hideAllModals);
                    closeBuyModal.addEventListener('click', hideAllModals);
                    closeFindFreelancersModal.addEventListener('click', hideAllModals);
                    
                    backBtn.addEventListener('click', showWelcomeModal);
                    backFromBuy.addEventListener('click', showWelcomeModal);
                    backFromFindFreelancers.addEventListener('click', showWelcomeModal);
                    
                    // Close modal when clicking outside
                    window.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                        if (event.target.classList.contains('modal')) {
                            hideAllModals();
                        }
                    });
                }
                
                // Modal control functions
                function showWelcomeModal() {
                    hideAllModals();
                    welcomeModal.style.display = 'block';
                    backBtn.style.display = 'none';
                }
                
                function showBuyModal() {
                    hideAllModals();
                    buyModal.style.display = 'block';
                    backFromBuy.style.display = 'block';
                }
                
                function showFindFreelancersModal() {
                    hideAllModals();
                    findFreelancersModal.style.display = 'block';
                    backFromFindFreelancers.style.display = 'block';
                }
                
                function hideAllModals() {
                    welcomeModal.style.display = 'none';
                    buyModal.style.display = 'none';
                    findFreelancersModal.style.display = 'none';
                }
                
                // Auto-show modal on page load (you can control this based on user session)
                window.addEventListener('load', () => {
                    // Check if user hasn't seen the modal recently (you can use localStorage for this)
                    const lastSeen = localStorage.getItem('kkWelcomeModalLastSeen');
                    const now = new Date().getTime();
                    const oneDay = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 1 day in milliseconds
                    
                    if (!lastSeen || now - lastSeen > oneDay) {
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            showWelcomeModal();
                            localStorage.setItem('kkWelcomeModalLastSeen', now.toString());
                        }, 1000);
                    }
                });
                
                // Initialize the modal when DOM is loaded
                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initModal);
            </script>

                <script>
                  let deferredPrompt;
                
                  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
                    const installModal = document.getElementById("installModal");
                    const installBtn = document.getElementById("installBtn");
                    const closeInstall = document.getElementById("closeInstall");
                    const headerInstallBtn = document.getElementById("installAppBtn");
                
                    const isInStandalone = window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches || window.navigator.standalone === true;
                    const isIos = /iphone|ipad|ipod/.test(window.navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase());
                    const isSafari = /^((?!chrome|android).)*safari/i.test(window.navigator.userAgent);
                
                    if (isInStandalone) {
                      headerInstallBtn.style.display = "none";
                      return;
                    }
                
                    // Android event
                    window.addEventListener("beforeinstallprompt", (e) => {
                      e.preventDefault();
                      deferredPrompt = e;
                      installModal.style.display = "block";
                    });
                
                    // Main Install button (modal)
                    installBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
                      if (deferredPrompt) {
                        deferredPrompt.prompt();
                        await deferredPrompt.userChoice;
                        deferredPrompt = null;
                      } else if (isIos && isSafari) {
                        alert("📱 On iPhone/iPad: Tap the Share button ➡️ 'Add to Home Screen'");
                      }
                      installModal.style.display = "none";
                    });
                
                    // Close modal
                    closeInstall.addEventListener("click", () => {
                      installModal.style.display = "none";
                    });
                
                    // Header Install button triggers the same logic
                    headerInstallBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
                      if (deferredPrompt) {
                        deferredPrompt.prompt();
                        await deferredPrompt.userChoice;
                        deferredPrompt = null;
                      } else if (isIos && isSafari) {
                        alert("📱 To install KampusKago:\n\n1. Tap the Share button\n2. Select 'Add to Home Screen'");
                      } else {
                        alert("Your browser doesn’t support direct installation. Try using Chrome or Safari.");
                      }
                    });
                
                    // Optional auto iOS reminder
                    if (isIos && isSafari) {
                      setTimeout(() => {
                        alert("📱 To install KampusKago:\n1. Tap the Share icon\n2. Choose 'Add to Home Screen'");
                      }, 4000);
                    }
                  });
                </script>
            </header>

                    </div> -->
                </section>

        <!-- Kampuskago Loading Screen -->
        <div id="kampuskago-loading-screen">
            <div class="floating-elements">
                <div class="floating-element float-1"></div>
                <div class="floating-element float-2"></div>
                <div class="floating-element float-3"></div>
                <div class="floating-element float-4"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="kampuskago-spinner">
                <div class="spinner-ring ring-1"></div>
                <div class="spinner-ring ring-2"></div>
                <div class="spinner-ring ring-3"></div>
                <div class="spinner-center"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="loading-text">Loading Kampuskago<span class="loading-dots"></span></div>
            <div class="loading-subtext">Preparing your marketplace experience...</div>
        </div>

        <script>
            // Kampuskago Loading Screen - Instant like browser spinner
            (function() {
                'use strict';
                
                const loadingScreen = document.getElementById('kampuskago-loading-screen');
                let isLoading = false;
                let activeLoads = 0; // Track multiple simultaneous loads
            
                function showLoading() {
                    if (isLoading) {
                        activeLoads++;
                        return;
                    }
                    
                    isLoading = true;
                    activeLoads = 1;
                    loadingScreen.classList.add('active');
                }
            
                function hideLoading() {
                    activeLoads--;
                    
                    // Only hide when all active loads are complete
                    if (activeLoads <= 0) {
                        isLoading = false;
                        activeLoads = 0;
                        loadingScreen.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                }
            
                // ===== INSTANT LOAD DETECTION =====
            
                // Show loading IMMEDIATELY when navigation starts
                document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    const target = e.target.closest('a');
                    
                    if (target && target.href) {
                        const url = new URL(target.href);
                        const currentUrl = new URL(window.location.href);
                        
                        // Only for actual page navigation
                        const isDifferentPage = url.pathname !== currentUrl.pathname || 
                                               url.origin !== currentUrl.origin;
                        
                        if (isDifferentPage && target.target !== '_blank') {
                            showLoading(); // INSTANT - no delay
                        }
                    }
                });
            
                // Show loading IMMEDIATELY when form is submitted
                document.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
                    showLoading(); // INSTANT
                });
            
                // Show loading IMMEDIATELY when page starts unloading (navigation)
                window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function() {
                    showLoading(); // INSTANT
                });
            
                // ===== INITIAL PAGE LOAD =====
                
                // Show loading IMMEDIATELY when page starts loading
                showLoading(); // INSTANT - show right away
                
                // Hide when DOM is ready (not waiting for all resources)
                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                    // Don't hide yet - wait for full load or timeout
                });
            
                // Hide when page is fully loaded
                window.addEventListener('load', function() {
                    hideLoading(); // INSTANT hide when done
                });
            
                // ===== FALLBACKS =====
                
                // If load event doesn't fire, hide after reasonable time
                setTimeout(hideLoading, 3000);
            
                // Also hide if user interacts (safety measure)
                document.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    if (isLoading) {
                        setTimeout(hideLoading, 100);
                    }
                });
            
            })();
        </script>
        <!-- Add this right before the closing </body> tag -->

                    .kk-gs-modal-body {
                        padding: 30px 25px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-options-grid {
                        grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
                        gap: 15px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-card {
                        padding: 25px 15px;
                        min-height: 200px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-icon {
                        font-size: 3rem;
                        height: 70px;
                        margin-bottom: 18px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-title {
                        font-size: 1.3rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-description {
                        font-size: 1rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-guest-section {
                        padding: 20px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-guest-text {
                        font-size: 1.1rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-guest-btn {
                        padding: 12px 30px;
                        font-size: 1rem;
                    }
                }
                
                @media (max-width: 576px) {
                    .kk-gs-modal-overlay {
                        padding: 10px;
                        padding-top: 40px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-modal-header {
                        padding: 25px 20px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-modal-title {
                        font-size: 1.8rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-modal-subtitle {
                        font-size: 1.1rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-modal-close {
                        top: 18px;
                        right: 18px;
                        width: 36px;
                        height: 36px;
                        font-size: 1.2rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-modal-body {
                        padding: 25px 20px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-options-grid {
                        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                        gap: 12px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-card {
                        padding: 22px 15px;
                        min-height: auto;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-icon {
                        font-size: 2.8rem;
                        height: 60px;
                        margin-bottom: 15px;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-title {
                        font-size: 1.2rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-option-description {
                        font-size: 0.95rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-guest-text {
                        font-size: 1rem;
                    }
                    
                    .kk-gs-guest-btn {
                        padding: 10px 25px;
                        font-size: 0.95rem;
                    }
                }
                
                /* Prevent body scroll when modal is open */
                body.kk-gs-modal-open {
                    overflow: hidden;
                }
                </style>
                `;
                
                // Initialize the modal
                function initGetStartedModal() {
                    // Add styles to document
                    document.head.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', getStartedModalStyles);
                    
                    // Add modal HTML to body
                    document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', getStartedModalHTML);
                    
                    const modal = document.getElementById('kk-get-started-modal');
                    const closeBtn = document.getElementById('kkGsModalClose');
                    const guestBtn = document.getElementById('kkGsGuestBtn');
                    const optionsGrid = document.querySelector('.kk-gs-options-grid');
                    
                    // Create option cards
                    Object.entries(GET_STARTED_OPTIONS).forEach(([key, option]) => {
                        const card = document.createElement('a');
                        card.className = 'kk-gs-option-card';
                        card.href = option.url;
                        
                        card.innerHTML = `
                            <div class="kk-gs-option-icon">
                                <i class="${option.icon}" style="color: ${option.color}"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div class="kk-gs-option-title">${option.title}</div>
                            <div class="kk-gs-option-description">${option.description}</div>
                        `;
                        
                        optionsGrid.appendChild(card);
                    });
                    
                    // Show modal function
                    window.showKampusKagoModal = function() {
                        modal.style.display = 'flex';
                        document.body.classList.add('kk-gs-modal-open');
                        
                        // Add animation class
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            modal.style.opacity = '1';
                        }, 10);
                    };
                    
                    // Hide modal function
                    function hideModal() {
                        modal.style.opacity = '0';
                        
                        setTimeout(() => {
                            modal.style.display = 'none';
                            document.body.classList.remove('kk-gs-modal-open');
                        }, 300);
                    }
                    
                    // Event Listeners
                    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', hideModal);
                    
                    guestBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                        hideModal();
                        // If you want to show the original welcome modal instead, uncomment:
                        // if (typeof showWelcomeModal === 'function') {
                        //     showWelcomeModal();
                        // }
                    });
                    
                    // Close modal when clicking outside
                    modal.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
                        if (event.target === modal) {
                            hideModal();
                        }
                    });
                    
                    // Close with Escape key
                    document.addEventListener('keydown', function(event) {
                        if (event.key === 'Escape' && modal.style.display !== 'none') {
                            hideModal();
                        }
                    });
                }
                
                // Initialize when DOM is loaded
                if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
                    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initGetStartedModal);
                } else {
                    initGetStartedModal();
                }
                
            })();
        </script>
    </body>
</html>
